series_metadata.series_description: Report of spirituous liquor case sales by brand, vendor/permit/month/ytd. Lists brand names, cases sold, name of company purchased from the time frame for preparing purchases and a record of year to date sales.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area for 1 year, then destroy provided Auditor of State has completed audit and the audit report has been released., Paper: Recycle
